summary: The South Bay is in a funding frenzy: nearly $4 billion raised across 21 companies in the past six weeks, with AI and robotics leading the charge—Nexthop AI and MatX each landed $500M Series rounds, while Rhoda AI and Mind Robotics hit similar peaks. Locally, hiring remains mostly steady across the region's 18-company pulse, though seven shops are actively ramping up and two are pulling back. This week brings a timely public forum on voice AI ethics at Santa Clara County Library and a community health discussion at San Jose State.
